content.full_text:
State of California Fair Political Practices Commission

P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814
107 SOUTH BROADWAY • • • SUITE 7007 • • • LOS ANGELES, 90012

September 12, 1980

Mrs. Hancock
1486 Red Hill North Drive
Upland, California 91786

Dear Mrs. Hancock:

Pursuant to your request, this letter will confirm my advice to you during our telephone conversation of September 11, 1980.

You stated that the Chaffey Community Republican Women Federated, is having it's annual fashion show fundraiser soon. This year, being an election year, candidates for various offices will be in attendance and acknowledged. However, the candidates are not endorsed, nor will they receive any contribution(s) from your organization. The proceeds will be used, in part, to pay for dues to the National Republican Women Association with the balance to be used for everyday overhead expenses. The Chaffey Community Republican Women Federated does not intend to use any of its treasury for political campaigns.

Government Code Section 82015 of the Political Reform Act defines a contribution as a "payment... unless it is clear from the surrounding circumstances that it is not made for political purposes." By regulation, the Commission defines the term "political purposes," in part, as payments for the purpose of influencing or attempting to influence the action of voters for or against the nomination or election of a candidate or candidates, or the qualification or passage of any measure (2 Cal. Adm. Code Section 18215).

Since none of the proceeds raised by the fashion show fundraiser will be used to influence the action of voters, the Chaffey Community Republican Women Federated will not qualify as a recipient committee under Government Code Section 82013(a) and, therefore, does not incur a filing obligation under the Political Reform Act of 1974.

Mrs. Hancock  
Page 2  
September 12, 1980

I hope this information has been helpful to you. Please do not hesitate to contact our office if I can be of further assistance.

Sincerely,

[signature]

Helen P. Arriola  
Political Reform Consultant

HPA: jg
